display.purpose: Page titles and hero headlines only — Cormorant Garamond.

label.purpose: Buttons, kickers, nav items, badges — IBM Plex Mono, uppercase.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for hover/active color and border transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Filled call-to-action button. Oxblood fill, bone label, hover shifts to ink.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.18em; background: #7d252b; color: #f7f5f0; border: 1px solid #7d252b; border-radius: 0; padding: 12px 28px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1a1918; border-color: #1a1918; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #7d252b; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Outlined button for secondary actions. Ink border, fills to ink on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.18em; background: transparent; color: #1a1918; border: 1px solid #1a1918; border-radius: 0; padding: 12px 28px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #1a1918; color: #f7f5f0; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #7d252b; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Paper-surface text field with a rule border, focuses to oxblood.
components.css: .ds-input { font-family: 'Manrope', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; background: #ffffff; color: #1a1918; border: 1px solid #e6e4df; border-radius: 0; padding: 12px 14px; width: 100%; transition: border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #66645e; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #7d252b; }

components.name: Paper Card
components.description: Rule-bordered paper surface on a bone page background. No shadow.
components.html:
Feature · 01

Weekly Roadmap

Agent 2 builds your next set of tasks based on pace, goals, and the market.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e6e4df; border-radius: 0; padding: 28px; } .ds-card-label { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.22em; color: #7d252b; margin: 0 0 12px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 600; color: #1a1918; margin: 0 0 10px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Manrope', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; color: #66645e; margin: 0; }

components.name: Nav Link (active)
components.description: Mono-uppercase nav item; active state uses a colored underline, not a filled pill.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.16em; color: #66645e; text-decoration: none; padding-bottom: 4px; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; transition: color 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #1a1918; } .ds-nav-link--active { color: #7d252b; border-bottom-color: #7d252b; }

narrative.overview: Delta reads like a well-kept paper file, not a SaaS dashboard: warm bone/paper surfaces, a single serif display face for anything that deserves weight, a plain sans for reading, and a small mono label style reserved for state and metadata (week numbers, kickers, button labels). The one saturated color, oxblood, is spent deliberately — primary actions, active states, and the handful of headings that should carry authority — never as generic decoration. The system explicitly rejects the earlier cyberpunk-dark, neon-accent dashboard aesthetic this product used before: no glassmorphic panels, no glowing borders, no gradient-filled stat tiles. Warmth here comes from tone of voice and generous whitespace, not from color noise or motion flourish.
keyCharacteristics: Square corners everywhere (0px radius) — the one deliberate geometric rule of the system.
Serif display type for anything that should read as a heading; sans for body; mono-uppercase for labels and buttons only.
Oxblood is spent on interaction and hierarchy signals, not on backgrounds or large fills.
Hairline rule borders do the separating work that shadows or heavy borders would otherwise do.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Oxblood is the only saturated color in the system. If a screen needs a second meaning-bearing color, desaturate it toward the neutral ramp rather than introducing a new hue family.

rules.name: The Serif-Only-For-Weight Rule
rules.body: Cormorant Garamond appears only on headings and the occasional italic emphasis line — never on body paragraphs, buttons, or labels.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Structure comes from a 1px rule border and a background-color step (bone -> paper -> accent-surface), never from box-shadow.

dos: Do keep corners square (0px) everywhere — buttons, cards, inputs, chips.
Do spend oxblood only on the interactive/hierarchy-bearing element — most of a screen should have none of it.
Do use Cormorant Garamond exclusively for headings; Manrope for body copy; IBM Plex Mono only for short uppercase labels.
Do separate content with a 1px rule border rather than a shadow or heavy divider.
Do keep read-only views free of side effects on the user's underlying data.
donts: Don't reintroduce the earlier dark cyberpunk/neon dashboard look as a default for new screens.
Don't use gradient text or background-clip: text for emphasis.
Don't use border-left/border-right as a colored accent stripe on cards or list rows.
Don't add drop shadows for elevation — this system is flat by design.
Don't round any corner — a single rounded button or card breaks the square-corner rule immediately.
